_note: Canonical one-line exponent glosses for the 65 profile-1 primes, authored at m0a-llmproxy staging as the judged sense surface for prime-stratum items and the none-stratum inventory (design S2; ASM-0640). Names and chart order mirror encoder/src/lexicon.ts; surface exponent lists mirror mapper/src/primes.ts (the surfaces the mapping under judgment actually matched). Each gloss is one plain-English line describing the sense; it never names any id or the sense's origin. BLIND-SURFACE RULE: gloss text must never contain the audit strings (kernel / nsm / urn: / mapper); the staging sweep asserts this.

glosses.name: I
glosses.gloss: the speaker; the person who is saying this

glosses.name: YOU
glosses.gloss: the person being spoken to

glosses.name: SOMEONE
glosses.gloss: some person, without saying who

glosses.name: SOMETHING~THING
glosses.gloss: some thing, without saying what

glosses.name: PEOPLE
glosses.gloss: people; persons in general

glosses.name: BODY
glosses.gloss: the body of a person or other living thing

glosses.name: KIND
glosses.gloss: a kind or sort of thing (as in 'a kind of bird')

glosses.name: PART
glosses.gloss: a part of something

glosses.name: THIS
glosses.gloss: this one; the one being pointed to or just mentioned

glosses.name: THE-SAME
glosses.gloss: the same one, not a different one

glosses.name: OTHER~ELSE~ANOTHER
glosses.gloss: another one; someone or something else, not this one

glosses.name: ONE
glosses.gloss: the number one; a single one of something

glosses.name: TWO
glosses.gloss: the number two

glosses.name: SOME
glosses.gloss: some; an amount or number of, without saying how much

glosses.name: ALL
glosses.gloss: all; every one of them; the whole of it

glosses.name: MUCH~MANY
glosses.gloss: much or many; a large amount or number

glosses.name: LITTLE~FEW
glosses.gloss: little or few; a small amount or number (the quantity sense, as in 'little water', 'few people')

glosses.name: GOOD
glosses.gloss: good

glosses.name: BAD
glosses.gloss: bad

glosses.name: BIG
glosses.gloss: big; of great size

glosses.name: SMALL
glosses.gloss: small; of little size (includes 'little' used of size, as in 'a little box')

glosses.name: THINK
glosses.gloss: to think; to have a thought or opinion about something

glosses.name: KNOW
glosses.gloss: to know something or someone

glosses.name: WANT
glosses.gloss: to want something

glosses.name: DON'T-WANT
glosses.gloss: to not want something

glosses.name: FEEL
glosses.gloss: to feel something (a feeling or a bodily sensation)

glosses.name: SEE
glosses.gloss: to see with the eyes

glosses.name: HEAR
glosses.gloss: to hear with the ears

glosses.name: SAY
glosses.gloss: to say something; to utter words

glosses.name: WORDS
glosses.gloss: a word or words; units of speech

glosses.name: TRUE
glosses.gloss: true; really so

glosses.name: DO
glosses.gloss: to do something; to perform an action (the main verb, not the helper verb in questions or negations like 'do you know', 'did not go')

glosses.name: HAPPEN
glosses.gloss: to happen; to take place

glosses.name: MOVE
glosses.gloss: to move; to change place or position

glosses.name: BE-SOMEWHERE
glosses.gloss: the 'be' of location: to be somewhere, as in 'the cat is in the garden'

glosses.name: THERE-IS
glosses.gloss: 'there is' / 'there are': the 'be' of existence, saying that something exists

glosses.name: BE-SPEC
glosses.gloss: the 'be' that says what someone or something is, as in 'this is a dog' or 'she is my sister'

glosses.name: IS-MINE
glosses.gloss: mine; belonging to the speaker

glosses.name: LIVE
glosses.gloss: to live; to be alive (also 'to live somewhere' of a living thing's dwelling)

glosses.name: DIE
glosses.gloss: to die; to stop being alive

glosses.name: WHEN~TIME
glosses.gloss: when; a time at which something happens

glosses.name: NOW
glosses.gloss: now; at this time

glosses.name: BEFORE
glosses.gloss: before; earlier than some time or event (the time sense, not 'in front of')

glosses.name: AFTER
glosses.gloss: after; later than some time or event (the time sense, not following or chasing someone)

glosses.name: A-LONG-TIME
glosses.gloss: a long time; a long stretch of time

glosses.name: A-SHORT-TIME
glosses.gloss: a short time; a brief stretch of time

glosses.name: FOR-SOME-TIME
glosses.gloss: for some time; over some stretch of time

glosses.name: MOMENT
glosses.gloss: a moment; a very short time

glosses.name: WHERE~PLACE
glosses.gloss: where; a place

glosses.name: HERE
glosses.gloss: here; at this place

glosses.name: ABOVE
glosses.gloss: above; higher than something

glosses.name: BELOW
glosses.gloss: below; lower than something

glosses.name: FAR
glosses.gloss: far; a long way from something

glosses.name: NEAR
glosses.gloss: near; close to something

glosses.name: SIDE
glosses.gloss: a side; the region toward one edge of something

glosses.name: INSIDE
glosses.gloss: inside; in the inner part of something

glosses.name: TOUCH
glosses.gloss: to touch; to be or come into contact with something

glosses.name: NOT
glosses.gloss: not; the word that negates what follows

glosses.name: MAYBE
glosses.gloss: maybe; possibly; it can be so and it can be not so

glosses.name: CAN
glosses.gloss: can; to be able to, or for something to be possible (includes asking or giving permission)

glosses.name: BECAUSE
glosses.gloss: because; for the reason that

glosses.name: IF
glosses.gloss: if; on the condition that

glosses.name: VERY
glosses.gloss: very; to a high degree

glosses.name: MORE
glosses.gloss: more; a greater amount or degree

glosses.name: LIKE~AS~WAY
glosses.gloss: like / as / way: being similar to something, or happening in the same way as something else (as in 'like this', 'in this way') -- the similarity sense, not enjoying something
